compressed_prompt: Create json ad for comfy baby diaper.
response:
Here's a sample JSON ad for a comfy baby diaper:

```json
{
  "ad_id": "CMFY_BB_DPR_001",
  "product_name": "Comfy Baby Diapers",
  "description": "Soft, breathable, and gentle on your baby's skin. Our diapers are designed to keep your little one dry and comfortable all day long.",
  "features": [
    "Ultra-absorbent core",
    "Soft and breathable outer layer",
    "Wetness indicator for easy changes",
    "Flexible waistband for a comfortable fit"
  ],
  "benefits": [
    "Prevents diaper rash and irritation",
    "Keeps baby dry for up to 12 hours",
    "Easy to put on and take off",
    "Affordable and available in various sizes"
  ],
  "target_audience": {
    "age_group": "0-3 years",
    "parents": true,
    "caregivers": true
  },
  "call_to_action": "Buy Now and Get 10% Off on Your First Order!",
  "promo_code": "COMFY10",
  "price": {
    "regular": 9.99,
    "discounted": 8.99
  },
  "image_url": "https://example.com/comfy-baby-diaper.jpg",
  "video_url": "https://example.com/comfy-baby-diaper-video.mp4",
  "rating": 4.5,
  "reviews": 1000
}
```

This JSON ad includes the following details:

* Ad ID and product name
* Description and features of the product
* Benefits of using the product
* Target audience (age group, parents, caregivers)
* Call-to-action (CTA) with a promo code
* Pricing information (regular and discounted prices)
* Image and video URLs
* Product rating and number of reviews

You can customize this JSON ad to fit your specific needs and marketing goals.
